summary: Dashboard shows each issue current workflow phase, responsible agent, and workflow artifact path
acceptance_criteria: Active issues show a current workflow phase or a clear unavailable value
Completed, failed, or blocked issues still expose the last known phase in the runtime state or dashboard detail
The implementation does not assume every issue follows the same fixed phase sequence
Add focused tests for the presenter or dashboard state transformation
validation: Dashboard running table includes workflow phase column
Presenter includes workflow_phase and agent_id in entry payloads
Tests verify presenter state transformation includes workflow fields
